post.summary: convert credit card numbers to vault ids
post.description: convert credit card numbers to vault ids

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: array of vault request objects. The index should be unique.

400.description:
Indexes are not unique. (errorCode 1)
 Some types are invalid. (errorCode 9)
 Index, type or plaintext is missing. (errorcode 10)
 Invalid credit card length - maximum allowed length is 30 and minimum allowed length is 13. (errorcode 11)
 Invalid credit card  - Some credit card numbers are invalid.Only digits are allowed (errorcode 12)

get.summary: retrieves the corresponding returntypes for vault ids and vault ids for tokens respectively.
get.description: Accepts both vault ids and tokens. Responds with corresponding vault-entries and vault ids respectively.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
Array of VaultEntryRequest objects.

 Valid combinations of inputType and returnType inside VaultEntryRequest object are :

| inputType | returnType |
|-----|-----|
| VAULT_ID   | CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRY_MONTH |
||CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRY_YEAR |
||GIFT_CARD_NUMBER |
  ||GIFT_CARD_PIN |
||GIFT_CARD_TRACK2 |
||TOKEN |
 | TOKEN  | VAULT_ID

400.description:
Indexes are not unique. (errorCode 1)
Some input types are invalid. (errorCode 2)
Some return types are invalid. (errorCode 3)
 returnType,inputType,index or inputData is missing. (errorcode 4)
Invalid vault id length - length of vault id is 32. (errorcode 5)
Some vault ids are invalid. Only digits are allowed. (errorcode 6)
Invalid token length - Token length is 16. (errorcode 7)
Some tokens are invalid. Only digits are allowed. (errorcode 8)

post.summary: converts given request types to vault ids.
post.description: Accepts a list of allowed types and converts them to vault ids

parameters.name: body
parameters.description:
Array of VaultRequest objects.

 Values accepted for 'type' in VaultRequest object are :

| types |
|----------|
|CREDIT_CARD_NUMBER|
|CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRY_MONTH |
|CREDIT_CARD_EXPIRY_YEAR |
|GIFT_CARD_NUMBER |
|GIFT_CARD_PIN |
|GIFT_CARD_TRACK2 |

400.description:
Indexes are not unique. (errorCode 1)
 Some types are invalid. (errorCode 9)
 Index, type or plaintext is missing. (errorcode 10)
 Invalid credit card length - maximum allowed length is 30 and minimum allowed length is 13. (errorcode 11)
 Invalid credit card  - Some credit card numbers are invalid.Only digits are allowed (errorcode 12)
 Invalid gift card - Some gift card numbers are invalid. Only digits are allowed (errorcode 13) 
 Invalid gift card length - maximum allowed length is 20 and minimum allowed length is 16. (errorcode 14)
 Invalid giftcard pin  - Some gift card pin numbers are invalid. Only digits are allowed (errorcode 15)
 Invalid gift card track2 length - maximum allowed length is 64 and minimum allowed length is 16. (errorcode 16)

index.description: Unique index to identify the data.
Unique index to identify the data.
Unique index for each request object.

responseData.description: decrypted value (plaintext) corresponding to the input type

index.description: Unique index for each request object.
